elongation_measurement.value: Elongation measurements of 50 camera springs under a 20-gram pull, recorded in production order (specific values not provided)
elongation_measurement.description: The elongation measurement of each camera spring, which is the variable being predicted for the 51st spring. It is the dependent variable that changes over time.

production_order.value: Sequential order of production for springs 1 through 50
production_order.description: The time/order in which the springs were produced. This serves as the independent variable (time axis) in the time series plot, capturing the decreasing trend in elongation measurements.
